mean_cn: n.屏幕，荧屏；  v.审查，筛选
mean_en: the flat surface at the front of a television, computer, or other electronic device, on which you see pictures or information; the large flat surface that films/movies or pictures are shown on
sentence: The movie theater's screen is so large!
sentence_trans: 这个电影院的银幕好大！
